title: Amtech B3195 MINI Combination PLIER with Spring
features: DURABLE: This mini combination plier is made from drop forged steel for durability
EASY TO USE: Spring loaded and with matt grip handles, the combo plier is comfortable and easy to use
MANY USES: It is suitable for a wide range of hobby and precision work.
ERGONOMIC NON-SLIP GRIP: For comfort and control during use.
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for DIY enthusiasts and professional tradespeople alike.
description: Product description This mini combination plier is made from drop forged steel for durability. Spring loaded and with matt grip handles, the combo plier is comfortable and easy to use. It is suitable for a wide range of hobby and precision work. Safety Warning No
